title: Help Us Improve Our AI Trading Bots Survey
author: Patient_Body4177
selftext:
Hi!

I'm reaching out to you because we're conducting a pilot study on AI trading bots in crypto markets, and it would be immensely helpful if you could take part.

To thank you for your time, participants will be entered into a raffle to win 25 $. This raffle is intended to encourage participation and ensure a diverse range of responses.

We'd greatly appreciate it if respondents could provide feedback about the survey, on aspects such as: clarity, relevance, comprehension of questions, flow and order, overall impressions, ease of completion, and any technical difficulties encountered.

To provide feedback, participants can write their comments and suggestions under “Additional Comments and Suggestions” at the bottom of the survey, or alternatively, email them to fuchsdominik@gmail.com. To take part in the raffle, please also leave your e-mail address (or another contact option) in the comment field at the end of the survey.

Here is the link to the survey: [https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/2WB38PX](https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/2WB38PX)

Thank you so much for your support and assistance!

Best regards,

Dominik
